notes: The file instantiates the abstract divisor-Galois-descent engine to the concrete arithmetic Frobenius σ, proving both the affine order transport (pointValuation_frobeniusFunctionFieldEquiv) and the ∞-order invariance, then assembles divisor equality and σ-naturality (frobeniusFunctionFieldEquiv_weilFunction_eq_smul). The single maxHeartbeats bump (1M, no comment) covers the affine valuation transport proof which needs several instance registrations for the mapped curve. The top-level σ-naturality theorem is a leaf exported for FrobeniusGaloisGeometric and is not consumed within this file.
